title: Close out Pi ticks orchestrator extension epic
description: Run the epic close-out retro, verify the qfs definition of done outside-in, harvest learnings into the ticks skill/docs where appropriate, and decide whether any follow-up epics are needed.
acceptance_criteria: Epic acceptance is verified item-by-item, retro notes are recorded, follow-up ticks are filed for remaining work, and qfs is closed only if the extension/package is actually usable.
